post.description: 内部调度器回调接口，用于触发任务到期通知
查找或创建当前用户的“日记”空间，并打开当天 YYYY-MM-DD.md 私人文档。
Creates a resumable Markdown import session. Use collaboration_mode=collaborative for shared docs or private for private docs.

delete.description: Deletes temporary uploaded chunks and assets for an unfinished import session.

post.description: Uploads an image asset referenced by the Markdown file and records its original relative path for link rewriting.

parameters.description: Original relative path in Markdown, such as images/a.png
parameters.name: original_path

post.description: Assembles uploaded chunks, rewrites local image references to uploaded asset URLs, and creates a document.

put.description: Uploads one raw binary Markdown chunk for a resumable import session.

patch.description: Saves plain Markdown content for diary documents. Only the owner can save, and this does not write the Yjs update log.

post.description: 使用用户名和密码登录
注销当前用户的登录状态
新建 Notion 风格会议纪要，默认启用协作并写入会议模板。

parameters.description: 可选：指定 project_id 或自定义标题
parameters.name: req

get.description: 获取项目列表，支持按名称搜索

delete.description: 删除指定项目及其关联任务

patch.description: 更新项目信息（名称、颜色等）

get.description: Returns task event rows after a cursor for reconnect/backfill. The cursor is the task_events auto-increment id.

patch.description: 更新任务详情（标题、内容、状态、优先级等）

get.description: Upgrades to a project WebSocket stream for PROJECT_INIT, PROJECT_SYNC, TASK_CREATED, TASK_UPDATED, TASK_DELETED, PRESENCE_SNAPSHOT, TASK_LOCKED, TASK_UNLOCKED, LOCK_ERROR, PING, and PONG messages. Authenticate with Authorization: Bearer <token> or the token query parameter.

parameters.description: JWT when a WebSocket client cannot send Authorization
parameters.name: token

101.description: Switching Protocols; subsequent frames use this message schema

post.description: 注册新用户，支持头像上传

get.description: 获取指定项目的任务列表

post.description: 在指定项目中创建新任务

get.description: 获取当前用户参与的所有任务
获取单个任务的详细信息

Upgrades to a task content WebSocket stream for CONTENT_INIT, CONTENT_SYNC, CONTENT_UPDATE, CONTENT_ACK, CONTENT_ERROR, PING, and PONG messages. Authenticate with Authorization: Bearer <token> or the token query parameter. Diary documents are rejected; save them with PATCH /api/v1/documents/{id}/content.

parameters.description: JWT when a WebSocket client cannot send Authorization
parameters.name: token

101.description: Switching Protocols; subsequent frames use this message schema

get.description: 获取当前登录用户的详细信息

patch.description: 更新当前用户的个人信息（头像、用户名、密码等）
